description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 30 hrs 45 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His tracked work was split mostly across Other, Java, and Markdown. The activity data shows 6 projects, but no public GitHub commits, repos, PRs, or new repos were recorded.
